--dark-bg

#ffffff
--white
Primary text color
rgba(255,255,255,0.6)
--muted
Secondary text, placeholders
#5da37d
--accent
Hover states, active elements
rgba(255,255,255,0.1)
--border
Subtle dividers, input borders
#c0392b
--red
Error states, critical warnings
#f39c12
--amber
Warning states, secondary actions
#9b59b6
--purple
Achievements, special events
